description: Golden Master registry consumed by build-test-runner-service. Each entry maps a COBOL programId to an expected stdout fixture and records whether the fixture was produced by a true COBOL runtime (e.g. GnuCOBOL cobcrun) or hand-curated as a synthetic expected output. Entries with classification true are recompiled with cobc and re-executed with cobcrun by the runner when output comparison is enabled.

entries.rationale: Expected output was reproduced from corpus/synthetic/programs/branch-account-guard.cbl with GnuCOBOL cobc -m and cobcrun BRNCH01.
Synthetic expected output now matches generated Java for the W0 COMPUTE/IF/DISPLAY subset using fixed-point HALF_EVEN rescale semantics.
Synthetic expected output now matches generated Java for the W0 PERFORM/COMPUTE/ADD/DISPLAY subset.
